payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Overstuffed dark brown glossy leather recliner armchair with padded, tufted cushions and visible creasing/wear; built-in side recline lever on the left arm is visible; chair is mostly visible but slightly cropped at the top-right edge and near the frame border; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark brown leather recliner, partial","long_description":"Overstuffed dark brown glossy leather recliner armchair with padded, tufted cushions and visible creasing/wear; built-in side recline lever on the left arm is visible; chair is mostly visible but slightly cropped at the top-right edge and near the frame border; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).","attributes":["dark brown color","glossy leather material","padded/overstuffed cushions","tufted stitching","visible creases/wear","left-side recline lever","single-seater","slightly cropped at edge"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
